data.body: Adjust the Setlist chart so the default viewport is biased toward upcoming work by shifting completed leading steps off-screen when possible while keeping earlier completed steps reachable via left navigation. Also add stronger visual treatment for beats with an active lease, including a slightly darker outline, a slightly darker beat-id header band, and a tasteful in-progress animation. Implement in a dedicated worktree and validate with tests plus repo quality gates.
data.title: Refine setlist viewport and active beat cues
